title: Israel Military Activity Monitor – Gaza and Lebanon
description: OSINT-based, delayed and analytical map layer showing reported Israeli military activity in Gaza and Lebanon. This dataset is not a real-time tactical feed.

data_policy.delay_policy: Recommended publication delay: 6–24 hours after the reported event.
data_policy.precision_policy: Coordinates are approximate and should represent public reporting locations, not live tactical positions.
data_policy.confidence_policy: Each event should include a confidence score from 1 to 5.
data_policy.safety_note: Do not publish real-time troop movements, active unit locations, or targeting information.

events.summary: Reported Israeli air activity in the Gaza City area based on open-source monitoring.
events.analysis_note: Demo entry. Replace with verified OSINT reporting before publication.

events.summary: Reported ground activity in the Khan Younis area.
events.analysis_note: Demo entry. Use only delayed and verified event-level data.

events.summary: Reported Israeli strike activity in the Bint Jbeil area of South Lebanon.
events.analysis_note: Demo entry. Replace with verified source-based event data.

events.summary: Reported cross-border activity near the Naqoura area.
events.analysis_note: Demo entry. Border incidents should be shown as analytical event points, not as live tactical information.

legend.ground_activity: Reported ground operation or maneuver area
